narrative:
Precinct South Bloomfield-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 630 registered voters, with 66.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a clear Republican lean of 9.4 percentage points.
